final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3×3 nine-grid poster for a 小红书 (Xiaohongshu) sleep-wellness knowledge series, designed so each of the 9 cells can be cropped independently as a standalone post card.

Style/medium: needs an ins风 ("ins-style") 治愈感 ("healing / cozy") aesthetic with light quasi-material illustration accents — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a strict 3-column × 3-row nine-grid layout; each cell fully self-contained and centered; visible thin border or clear gap between every cell to allow clean crop; no title or body text placed near any grid boundary
Subject: must include all 9 grid cards with the following content and illustration elements:
  Grid 1 (cover): large headline "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips", subtitle "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏", illustration: soft bed / moon / pillow / eye mask — most eye-catching cell, hero layout
  Grid 2: title "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机", body "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。", illustration: phone / moon / sleepy-face doodle
  Grid 3: title "2. 睡前把灯光调暗", body "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。", illustration: bedside lamp / warm yellow light / curtain
  Grid 4: title "3. 房间温度别太高", body "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。", illustration: air conditioner / thermometer / duvet
  Grid 5: title "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡", body "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。", illustration: coffee cup / tea cup / prohibition symbol
  Grid 6: title "5. 睡前洗个热水澡", body "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。", illustration: bathroom steam / towel / hot water
  Grid 7: title "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来", body "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。", illustration: notebook / fountain pen / small desk lamp
  Grid 8: title "7. 固定上床时间", body "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。", illustration: clock / moon / bed
  Grid 9: title "8. 试试深呼吸放松法", body "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。", footer small text "收藏这组，今晚试试看", illustration: breathing wave lines / closed-eyes figure / stars
Scene/backdrop: overall canvas is a unified creamy-white / light oat / pale caramel tonal field; each cell shares the same background language
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, healing, night-time cozy atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: must be cream-white / light beige / pale oat / light caramel dominant with small accents of deep brown for text; overall gentle and soothing
Materials/textures: needs a light quasi-material ("轻拟物") illustration texture with clean magazine-grade layout feel — exact surface treatment is yours
Text (verbatim): must include all Chinese text exactly as specified per grid above:
  "让你倒头就睡的8个 tips"
  "失眠党、熬夜党一定要收藏"
  "1. 睡前1小时别玩手机" / "蓝光会让大脑更清醒，越刷越睡不着。"
  "2. 睡前把灯光调暗" / "暖光环境能帮助身体进入"准备睡觉"的状态。"
  "3. 房间温度别太高" / "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"
  "4. 晚上别喝浓茶咖啡" / "咖啡因会延迟困意，让你躺很久还睡不着。"
  "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"
  "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"
  "7. 固定上床时间" / "每天差不多时间睡，生物钟会越来越稳定。"
  "8. 试试深呼吸放松法" / "吸气4秒，停4秒，呼气6秒，慢慢就有困意了。"
  "收藏这组，今晚试试看"
  All text must be Chinese only — no English, no garbled characters
Constraints: must preserve strict 3×3 grid structure; every cell must be independently readable after crop; all text large, legible, well-spaced; comfortable white space within each cell; unified visual style across all 9 cells; magazine-grade new-media layout quality
Avoid: must avoid cheap marketing feel, excessive decoration, text near crop lines, English text, garbled characters, inconsistent styles between cells

  "3. 房间温度别太高" / "稍微凉一点，更容易快速入睡。"

  "5. 睡前洗个热水澡" / "能让身体放松下来，入睡速度更快。"
  "6. 脑子停不下来就写下来" / "把烦心事和待办清单写下，大脑会更容易放松。"
